title: Re-verify live dashboard truth end-to-end against served endpoints and DB
objective: Read-only audit. Verify that every value displayed on the live dashboard accurately reflects DB truth and live API payloads. Identify any field that is computed incorrectly, sourced from a stale path, or missing entirely. Do not change any code.
context: Prior tasks have modified dashboard_server.py and dashboard.html extensively (r25 fallback, bankroll accounting, PnL sign fix, REST fallback for stale marks, etc.). This task does a fresh end-to-end truth check against the live running system to confirm all displayed fields are correct and internally consistent. Runtime is at http://localhost:8900.
do_not_touch: All files are READ-ONLY in this task — no edits, no patches
inputs: DB query: SELECT * FROM trades WHERE status='open' from trades_sports.db
DB query: SELECT id, market_slug, side, pnl_usd, entry_px, exit_px, reason_close FROM trades ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 25
Read dashboard_server.py to understand how each field is computed
Read dashboard.html to understand how each field is displayed
deliverables: For each major display area, a PASS/FAIL verdict with evidence:
1. Open positions panel: DB open rows vs /api/trades vs dashboard display
2. Bankroll/accounting strip: available_cash, committed, live equity — internally consistent?
3. PnL fields: realized, unrealized, net — match DB and /api/state?
4. r25 win rate: value shown vs DB-computed r25 from last 25 closed trades
5. Position card fields: entry_px, current_px, TP/SL levels, PnL sign correctness for BUY_YES and BUY_NO
6. Game feed: games shown, status labels accurate
7. Mark source: stale mark fallback (mark_source field) displaying correctly
Any field that is wrong, stale, zeroed incorrectly, or missing
Recommended fix scope for each failure (file + line range)
acceptance_criteria: All 7 display areas evaluated with PASS/FAIL and evidence
Each failure has root cause and recommended fix scope
verification: Confirm result file exists at correct outbox path
DB open row count must match /api/trades open count — note any mismatch explicitly
